{{Quote|Mendicat was a scrap mining and recycling station. Because of ''his'' error in programming the orbital computers, the station went off course and fell into the sun.|Crix Madine, on Sulamar|<ref name="Darksaber" />}}
'''Mendicat''' was a scrap [[Mining/Legends|mining]] and recycling [[Space station/Legends|space station]] that [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] a [[Star/Legends|star]]<ref name="Darksaber" /> within a [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]] [[Mendicat system/Legends|system]].<ref name="EAOC" /> The station was located outside the borders of [[Realspace/Legends|space]] controlled by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] by [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]].<ref name="EGtW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref> By that date,<ref name="Date" /> the individual [[Sulamar]] served aboard the station. When he made an error in [[Programmer/Legends|programming]] Mendicat's orbital [[Computer/Legends|computers]], the space station diverted from its previous course and, as a result, fell into the star it was orbiting.<ref name="Darksaber" />

Barely escaping<ref name="Darksaber" /> the station's destruction,<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|306|Mendicat}}</ref> Sulamar later reinvented himself as a decorated [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[General/Legends|general]]. He often claimed to have led Imperial [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] to victory in what he termed the "[[Massacre of Mendicat]]."<ref name="Darksaber" /> In 12 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]],<ref name="Date" /> the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic military]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]] [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]] revealed the truth regarding Mendicat's fate to the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Durga Besadii Tai]], with whom Sulamar was working at the [[Time/Legends|time]].<ref name="Darksaber" />

==Behind the scenes==
Mendicat was first mentioned in the [[1995]] novel [[Darksaber (novel)|''Darksaber'']], written by [[Kevin J. Anderson]].<ref name="Darksaber" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the [[Star system/Legends|star system]] containing Mendicat in grid square I-8.<ref name="TEA" />
